source: video disc_p-f3qDjrVDY (219 f_, 55 chat, 27 minimap, 2 entries). Contact sheet TOP-LEFT = the 'Revenge of the Fallen' login/menu screen (server CONFIRMED). Biomes: green grass/forest, grey stone rooms, heavy ORANGE/RED LAVA areas, sandstone, red brick boss rooms, purple dungeon. On-screen 'X/16' completion overlays. NOTE: chat has heavy toxic/slur spam (not transcribed).

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) SERVER CONFIRMED ROTF (login screen). (2) VOID COINS currency — 'has analyzed a bag of void coins! Obtaining...' (a coin bag you analyze/open for loot). (3) IDENTIFY-RECEIPT item system — items drop unidentified; 'You have identified the receipt! Obtaining...' reveals the item (an unidentified-item gating mechanic). (4) SPECIAL CRATE unboxing + Loot Notifier (consistent with prior tags). (5) STARFORCE zone has multiple meme bosses (Gem Gem here, The Zuck earlier) announced via 'Starforce -' prefix. (6) 'X/16' COMPLETION COUNTER — death-notifier format is [N/16, fame] (e.g. [8/16, 597], [8/16, 376]) and the screen shows '6/16'/'8/16' overlays -> likely 16 CLASSES, counter = how many are 8/8-maxed (combines with the '8/8' per-class stat maxing from the guide tag). (7) STAT-POT caps + 'You're now maxed' + overflow-to-vault recur. (8) Commands: /vault /realm /nexus /ah /starforce /tp /tell.
uncertain: 'X/16' counter interpretation (16 classes maxed vs 16 stats) is inferred, not stated. 'Gem Gem' / 'cee key' / 'Seal of Blasphemous' exact spellings partial. Malphas full arc not all captured (just the death line here). Dungeon entry names not legible (2 transitions, lava biomes).
confidence: HIGH that this is GENUINE ROTF (login screen) and for the confirmed taunts (Firebreather, Archdemon Malphas, Suspicious Dragon) + the void-coins / identify-receipt / Starforce-Gem-Gem findings. MEDIUM for the /16 counter meaning + partial item names.
